label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. So we have five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They start with specific positions, and then there are several swaps. I need to track each swap step by step to figure out where Eve ends up. Let me write down the initial positions first. Initial positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So Dave was left winger, Eve was goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes left winger. Let me update the positions: After first swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. Claire was right midfielder, Bob was center midfielder. Now Claire becomes center midfielder and Bob becomes right midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was fullback, Bob is right midfielder. After swapping, Alice becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes fullback. After third swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions again. Eve was left winger, Dave was goalkeeper. After swapping, Eve becomes goalkeeper and Dave becomes left winger. After fourth swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. Bob is fullback, Alice is right midfielder. After swapping, Bob becomes right midfielder and Alice becomes fullback. After fifth swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper So at the end of all these swaps, Eve is back to being goalkeeper? Wait, but let me double check each step because it's easy to make a mistake. Starting again: Initial: A: FB, B: CM, C: RM, D: LW, E: GK 1. D & E swap: D: GK, E: LW 2. C & B swap: C: CM becomes CM? Wait no. Wait Claire was RM (right midfielder), Bob was CM (center midfielder). After swap, Claire is CM and Bob is RM. So yes, that's what I had. 3. A & B swap: Alice (FB) and Bob (now RM). So Alice becomes RM, Bob becomes FB. Wait after second swap Bob was RM, then third swap Alice (FB) and Bob (RM) swap. So after third swap, Alice is RM, Bob is FB. Fourth swap: E (LW) and D (GK) swap. So E becomes GK, D becomes LW. Then fifth swap: Bob
